use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HEREDITARY TYROSINEMIA TYPE 1 (HT-1) IN COMBINATION WITH DIETARY RESTRICTION OF TYROSINE AND PHENYLALANINE

indications.text:
ORFADIN® is indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients with hereditary tyrosinemia type 1 (HT-1) in combination with dietary restriction of tyrosine
and phenylalanine.
ORFADIN® is indicated for the treatment of patients with hereditary tyrosinemia type 1 (HT-1) in combination with dietary restriction of tyrosine and phenylalanine.
